disallowed_language: native proof of the completion ladder
derivation of the full role-labeled shared_B universe

locked_support.claim: slot_delta_mod15 and fiber_delta_mod60 recover the Euclidean order once the four groups are already known.
locked_support.name: monotone order signal

locked_support.claim: outside boundary span rises while inside fiber residual falls, giving a bounded local completion grammar.
locked_support.name: inside/outside reading

locked_support.claim: C_delta_mod15 exposes 12 form-pure two-row transition microcells.
locked_support.name: transition microcell layer

locked_support.claim: 24 rows can be visually read as 2 x 3 x 4 at the count level, but native sheet and channel coordinates were not found.
locked_support.name: count-level grid hint

negative_results.claim: native delta fields alone do not reconstruct the four six-row forms.
negative_results.name: delta partition failure

negative_results.claim: 2,951 flat row-field cuts did not derive the four-form partition.
negative_results.name: flat cut failure

negative_results.claim: 40 reciprocal or shared-endpoint incidence cuts did not derive the four-form partition.
negative_results.name: incidence cut failure

negative_results.claim: six C-endpoint incidence components did not refine into the four forms in the tested family.
negative_results.name: refinement failure

negative_results.claim: 20,910 tested microcell quotient aggregations did not recover the four forms.
negative_results.name: microcell aggregation failure

negative_results.claim: no tested native row field supplied the two-sheet or three-channel coordinate.
negative_results.name: grid coordinate failure

next_work.reason: the missing grouping law may live upstream in the source construction rather than in row fields.
the project needs a human-readable boundary before more searches.
the monotone and microcell signals should be tested against label shuffles and source perturbations.

plateau_statement: Artifact 067 records the local completion plateau. The current evidence supports a local completion grammar, not a cosmic conclusion. The strongest positive signals are a non-label monotone order, a bounded inside/outside reading, and a 12-cell transition microcell layer. The repeated negative results show that the native four-form partition has not been derived. This is not native closure, not full role-labeled shared_B universe derivation, and not Gap A closure. answer-label leakage remains open.
